reviewReply.comment: Hola. Nos podes indicar el horario por favor.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Extremely slow service. There's only one employee to handle four pumps. I was there on Monday, January 9, 2023, at 11 PM.

reviewReply.comment: Hola. Si lamentablemente a esa hora no tenemos prevista mucha demanda y hay un solo playero. Mil disculpas
